videos.title: First race of the season - Cabin life in Beitostølen / #SKIRIOUSVLOG
videos.description:
Season opener in Beitostølen — but this vlog is a little different.
Not so much racing or training this time… more of the reality around it.
Long days in the cabin, waiting for winter to arrive, getting ready for the first start line of the year.

Join Mika Vermeulen inside the team no team setup as he takes on the opening weekend of the season:
the atmosphere, the nerves, the slow moments, and everything that happens when the weather is cold and the schedule is tight.

Sometimes the story isn’t the race itself — it’s everything around it.

🎥 Produced by Skirious Network
🎙 Podcast: Skirious Problems — available on Spotify & Apple Podcasts
🌍 Follow us on Instagram:
@skirious_problems / @mikaa_ver / @jimmycluggz

videos.title: #2 - SESONGÅPNING BEITO
videos.description: Teamet sparket i gang sesongen på Beitostølen! En bra helg med mange gode resultater, men vi har bare så vidt begynt ;)

videos.title: Preparing for the Season Opening Races | Beitostølen, Norway Part 1
videos.description:
I am finally back at sea-level after a three week altitude camp in Livigno, Italy. We flew back to Oslo and then promptly drove up to Beitostølen, Norway, which is about a three hour drive  northwest into the mountains. We have been enjoying some proper winter conditions with pretty cold temperatures and good snow! It’s also a very beautiful place. This is my final week of training before my first races of the season next weekend. Thanks for watching!

Fundraiser link: https://go.rallyup.com/zaketterson/Campaign/Details

videos.title: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
tags: 2019 Lapham Loppet XC Freestyle and Classical Ski Race
videos.transcript:
but the weather did make for a perfect

Lobeck got a little help from Mother
Nature soft mushy bass have real snow
the Lapham peak loop is just more than a
mile long and usually relies on man-made

fresh snow is pretty nice but I was kind
of struggling on some of the hills there
the skiers weren't just gliding along
